name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
Here's what I can do:

💬 Chat — Ask me anything, and I'll reply with context.
📝 Examples — See sample interactions.
🗑 Clear — Reset our conversation.
📋 Summary — Summarize some text.
📊 Usage — Check your session stats.

Just tap a button or send me a message!

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
